snippet.title: All the Prime Ministerās Men  | Al Jazeera Investigations
snippet.description:
An explosive investigation reveals how a criminal gang is colluding with the security forces of Bangladesh and has links to Prime Minister Sheikh Hasina.

Undercover reporters with the I-Unit expose how a former street mafia claims to have captured a state. The brother of Bangladeshās army chief boasts that he can use police and paramilitary units to abduct rivals and earn millions in bribes.

Documents obtained by the I-Unit also show that head of the army has helped a convicted killer evade justice. And how the countryās military intelligence service has secretly bought spyware from Israel ā a country that Bangladesh does not recognise ā that can monitor the prime ministerās political rivals. 

The I-Unit invited all those involved in this investigation to respond to our findings. They included Bangladeshās Prime Minister, Home Minister, Inspector General, Police Commissioner and all four Ahmed Brothers. 

None responded to our inquiries.

After the release of the investigation, Bangladeshās Ministry of Foreign Affairs issued a statement describing our findings as a āsmear campaignā that was orchestrated by opponents of the regime based abroad.
It dismissed statements made by the brother of Bangladeshās Chief of Army Staff s baseless and said Haris Ahmed had no links to Prime Minister Sheikh Hasina or any other state institution.

Check our website:  http://www.aljazeera.com/

snippet.title: Bangladesh security forces ācolluding with criminal networkā
snippet.description:
Al Jazeeraās Investigative Unit has uncovered a criminal network colluding with the security forces of Bangladesh which is profiting from powerful links with the countryās prime minister.
Our investigation found evidence that General Aziz Ahmed, head of the Bangladesh Army, helped criminals to evade justice and make money from state corruption. 
Al Jazeera's Will Thorne has this exclusive report.

snippet.title: 28 PARENTING HACKS From Crafty Moms And Dads || Tips for Being Friends with Your Child
snippet.description:
Tips and tricks every parent will be thankful for. 

Being a parent isnāt an easy task, and most of the time, parents come across more problems than they can solve. Well, to help you out, I wanted to share with you some amazing hacks that will save you time and the hassle that comes with taking care of a little one. Painting is everyoneās favorite activity, but it can be very messy ā and clothes get destroyed. So, to keep your little oneās outfit nice and clean, use a plastic bag as an apron for them. Toddlers tend to drop their pacifiers all the time, and once the pacifier is down, it needs to be cleaned. To prevent that from happening, tie the pacifier on a balloon. You can use a closet organizer and label it for each day of the week to make sure that picking outfits for the day wonāt take hours. Watch until the end to discover all the genius parenting hacks you need to know. 

Timestamps:

snippet.description:
TAWHID AFRIDI - BIKRAMPUR - MUNSHIGANJ - MAWA GHAT - PADMA BRIDGE - ą¦¤ą§ą¦¹ą¦æą¦¦ ą¦ą¦«ą§ą¦°ą¦æą¦¦ą¦æ - ą¦¦ą§ą¦¬ą§ą¦Ŗ

In this vlog we showed the beauty of Munshiganj like Mawa Ghat, Padma Bridge, Ilish or Hilsa Fish & Dhaka Mawa Highway.

Edited By : Mahabub Hasan Murad
Color Grading : Hayat Mahmud

MUNSHIGANJ :-
Munshiganj, also historically known as Bikrampur, is a district in central Bangladesh. It is a part of the Dhaka Division and borders Dhaka District.

PADMA BRIDGE :-
The Padma Multipurpose Bridge is a multipurpose road-rail bridge across the Padma River, the main distributary of Ganges, under construction in Bangladesh with its own resources. It will connect Louhajong, Munshiganj to Shariatpur and Madaripur, linking the south-west of the country, to northern and eastern regions.

ILISH / HILSA :-
The ilish, also known as the ilisha, hilsa, hilsa herring or hilsa shad, is a species of fish related to the herring, in the family Clupeidae. It is a very popular and sought-after food fish in the Indian Subcontinent. The most famous hilsha fish comes from Chandpur District, Bangladesh.

The story revolves around a village which is divided into half by Telugu and Tamil people. Hari (Naga Shaurya) gets dragged into it as he joins a college in that village. But his life takes a new turn when he discovers that she is a Tamilian from this village. There on follows comedy of errors and finally a happy ending with an unexpected twist.

snippet.title: CID (Bengali) - ą¦øą§ą¦ą¦ą¦”ą§ - At The Store - Full Episode
snippet.description:
Click to watch all the episodes of CID - 
https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PL5O3zv2ZcASgNl2V1M1Y8fEFWuo4_wIXb

Episode 409 : At The Store
-------------------------------------------
Three Friends - one blind, one mute, and one deaf are at a grocery store when they witness a crime taking place. A woman wearing a burkha and carrying a child is being chased by another man when impulsively she gives the baby to the deaf guy and leaves the store. The friends call CID, confused about what they should do. 

About CID:
--------------------
CID is an Indian detective television anthology series about India's Crime Investigation Department, created by B. P. Singh for Sony Entertainment Television India and Sony Entertainment Television Asia.  Following a pilot episode on 29 April 1997, the series premiered on 21 January 1998 and is the longest-running television series in India, having completed 19 years in January 2017 and entering the 20th year of its run. The show airs on Saturday and Sunday nights at 10:30 PM IST.

snippet.title: Godzilla vs. Kong ā Official Trailer
snippet.description:
In theaters and streaming exclusively on @HBOMax* March 26.
Ā 
*Available on @HBOMax in the US only, for 31 days, at no extra cost to subscribers.

https://www.godzillavskong.com/
https://www.facebook.com/GodzillaVsKong
https://www.instagram.com/godzillavskong/
https://twitter.com/GodzillaVsKong

---

From Warner Bros. Pictures and Legendary Pictures comes the long-awaited face-off between two icons, āGodzilla vs. Kong,ā the next epic adventure in Legendaryās cinematic Monsterverse, directed by Adam Wingard.

Legends collide in āGodzilla vs. Kongā as these mythic adversaries meet in a spectacular battle for the ages, with the fate of the world hanging in the balance.  Kong and his protectors undertake a perilous journey to find his true home, and with them is Jia, a young orphaned girl with whom he has formed a unique and powerful bond.  But they unexpectedly find themselves in the path of an enraged Godzilla, cutting a swath of destruction across the globe.  The epic clash between the two titansāinstigated by unseen forcesāis only the beginning of the mystery that lies deep within the core of the Earth.

The film stars Alexander SkarsgĆ„rd (āBig Little Lies,ā āThe Little Drummer Girlā), Millie Bobby Brown (āStranger Thingsā), Rebecca Hall (āChristine,ā āProfessor Marston and the Wonder Womenā), Brian Tyree Henry (āJoker,ā āSpider-Man: Into the Spider-Verseā), Shun Oguri (āWeathering with Youā), Eiza GonzĆ”lez (āFast & Furious Presents: Hobbs & Shawā), Julian Dennison (āDeadpool 2ā), with Kyle Chandler (āGodzilla: King of the Monstersā) and DemiĆ”n Bichir (āThe Nun,ā āThe Hateful Eightā).
Wingard (āThe Guest,ā āYouāre Nextā) directed from a screenplay by Eric Pearson (āThor: Ragnarokā) and Max Borenstein (āGodzilla: King of the Monsters,ā āKong: Skull Islandā), story by Terry Rossio (āPirates of the Caribbean: Dead Men Tell No Talesā) and Michael Dougherty & Zach Shields (āGodzilla: King of the Monstersā), based on the character āGodzillaā owned and created by TOHO CO., LTD.  The film was produced by Mary Parent, Alex Garcia, Eric McLeod, Jon Jashni, Thomas Tull and Brian Rogers, with Jay Ashenfelter, Herbert W. Gains, Dan Lin, Roy Lee, Yoshimitsu Banno and Kenji Okuhira executive producing.

Legends collide in āGodzilla vs. Kongā as these mythic adversaries meet in a spectacular battle for the ages, with the fate of the world hanging in the balance.  Kong and his protectors undertake a perilous journey to find his true home, and with them is Jia, a young orphaned girl with whom he has formed a unique and powerful bond.  But they unexpectedly find themselves in the path of an enraged Godzilla, cutting a swath of destruction across the globe. snippet.title: Sesh Obhimaan (Yevadu 2) Bengali Dubbed Full Movie | Ram Charan, Kajal Aggarwal
snippet.description: The movie story deals with Abhiram a handsome looking NRI, who is born and brought up in London. Even though he lives abroad, Abhiram loves Indian culture and family values. One fine day, he comes to know about his dad's past which is related back to a huge family based in India.In order to fulfill his dad's dream, Abhiram lands in India. There he finds out that his roots are based in the joint family of Balaraju. Rest of the story is as to how Abhiram manages to successfully enter the family, and wins the love of everyone.

A B O U T  N T V 
From unbiased and comprehensive News to Entertainment programs, International Television Channel Ltd. (NTV) has maintained its flagship position across all verticals since its beginning and became one of the most popular TV channels in Bangladesh. With the slogan āSomoyer Sathe Agamir Potheā meaning āheading towards the future with timeā, holding Bangla language and culture close to heart, Al-haj Mohammad Mosaddak Ali founded NTV on 3 July 2003.
NTV offers diverse mix of programs such as news bulletins, current affairs, talk shows, soap operas, educational, religious, politics related programs, drama, movie, reality shows and other entertainment programs. NTV delivers reliable information across all platforms: TV, Digital platform (ntvbd.com) and Mobile. Apart from Bangladesh, NTV broadcasts its programmes in UK, USA, Canada, some parts of Europe, Middle East, and beyond. Enjoy and stay connected with us!!!

snippet.description:
Bani is shocked to learn that Jay has acquired all of Markat's strength by killing the latter in a duel. Alarmed by this news, Bani makes a run for her life and crashes into Veer's car, who lashes out at her for following him! With no other way out, will Bani confront Jay?
#ColorsTV #Naagin5

snippet.title: Military takes power in Myanmar, Aung San Suu Kyi detained
snippet.description:
Myanmar leader Aung San Suu Kyi and other senior figures from the ruling party have been detained in an early morning raid. 
The military declares a state of emergency following days of escalating tension between the civilian government and the powerful military, which claims the November election was tainted by fraud. 
 
Al Jazeeraās Victoria Gatenby reports.

snippet.title: India claim stunning series win, end Australia's Gabba streak | Vodafone Test Series 2020-21
snippet.description:
Rishabh Pant was the hero as an injury-ravaged India ended Australia's 32-year undefeated run at the Gabba, executing a record-breaking final day chase to win the Test by three wickets and the series 2-1.

Fixtures, news, videos for the #AUSvIND Tests: https://cricketa.us/AUSvIND-Tests     
Follow us on Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/cricketcomau

Credits:

Synopsis
Arjun (Gopichand), one of RAWās best agents, who also leads a double life as Ramakrishna, who works as a bank employee. For years, RAW has been planning to capture Qureshi, who has been behind some of the biggest terror attacks in India. Despite knowing Qureshi is in Pakistan, RAW is helpless. In one of his missions, Arjun goes to Syria to nab a key member of Qureshiās gang. It sets him off on a journey which brings him face to face with Qureshiās son Sohail (Upen Patel). Watch the movie to find out whether Arjun would succeed in his mission or not.

snippet.title: 2021 BHAUKAL (2021) New Released Full Hindi Dubbed Movie | 2021 South Movies In Hindi | Latest Movie
snippet.description:
Businessman and gold smuggler George Peter and his driver are killed under mysterious circumstances. Police investigators Muhammed Easa and Isaac discover that it was carried out with a surgical blade, causing them to think a doctor was behind it. They start investigating medical shops. At the same time, Marco JR, George's brother, meets Davis and his sons ā their rivals ā to ask whether it was their work. Davis's son Abraham starts speaking in a condescending manner, enraging Marco and provoking him to shoot Abraham.During his funeral, Easa asks Davis if it was Marco. Davis does not tell him, thinking that he could seek revenge on his own.Some days after an unknown person shoots Patrick ā the mid stander between the 2 gangs ā Easa and Isaac take him to Star Hospital where he gets murdered despite being protected with maximum security. This solidifies Easa and Isaac's theory that the murderer is a doctor.

Meanwhile, someone interrogates a pharmacist to know the truth over the murders. Both the gangs start believing that someone is after them.Isaac becomes suspicious of Easa since he earlier said that he had an informant but didn't reveal anything about him. Isaac investigates on his own, discovering that Dr. Mikhael John, the casualty specialist of Star Hospital, is both the killer and the informant. He also understands that Easa is helping Mikhael since they had contacted each other several times. He tells Easa what he has learned in his investigation, forcing Easa to reveal everything in order to prevent the arrest of Dr. Mikhael. Easa explains that when Mikhael was 10 years old, he was involved in an accident that killed his father. Mikhael's mother blamed him for his father's death.
